paperTitle: Learning to Accelerate Vision-Language-Action Models through Adaptive Visual Token Caching
organization: HIT / HIT Shenzhen / Meituan Academy of Robotics / Central South University / HKUST(GZ)

benchmarks.label: LIBERO
benchmarks.detail: Suites: libero spatial 85.6 · libero object 86.2 · libero goal 76.6 · libero 10 59.2 | Table 1 | Notes: All four LIBERO suites evaluated (Spatial, Object, Goal, Long). Uses standard OpenVLA weights and setup with 50 demos per task.

benchmarks.label: SimplerEnv
benchmarks.detail: Suites: google robot vm 75.5 · google robot va 63 | Tasks: pick coke can vm 92.3 · move near vm 84.2 · open close drawer vm 72.7 · pick coke can va 92.1 · move near va 81.5 · open close drawer va 31.2 | Table 3 | Notes: Only Google Robot evaluated (Visual Matching and Variant Aggregation with 3 tasks each). No WidowX tasks. DrawerApple task included in table but not part of standard 3-task suite average for google_robot_vm/va.
